title: Chroma API
description: A small library mod focused on items and shared textures.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/facbf65cf728a86eb327b85abf87a9a54067de62.png)
---
Use existing textures and item classes as a foundation for your mod, with new content being added regularly.


<details>
<summary>Example</summary>

![Chroma Cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d356043feb712bf98f167cb0def494d68647fc6_0.webp)
![BellFlower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d52eceb6773c176a0118584dae4493ac5bc9a861.png)
![EasterEgg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/694077d2ebcaafccbdfd0928d10cf729446cfd93.png)

</details>

The mod is primarily used for:
- Chroma: Tools & Utilities
- Happy Ghast: Upgrade Snowballs
